title: celtis biondii var. holophylla
intro: Celtis biondii var. holophylla, also known as Long Dan Cao or Radix Celastri, is a plant species in the Celtis genus, native to China and used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Celtis biondii var. holophylla include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues, as well as promoting wound healing. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be combined with other herbs to create herbal preparations for various health benefits.
